rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>My mentor has entrusted me with
<Color=red>decorating<Color=white> a weapon in a stylish way...

She told me to "make it <Color=red>sparkle<Color=white>!" And
that "it must radiate burning <Color=red>passion<Color=white>!"
But I don't know what she's talking about.
She's got an allergy to monsters too, so
that means <Color=red>monster parts<Color=white> are off-limits.

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>If I just had a weapon I could use as a
reference for where to start, that would
help a lot!

feels like an impossible task...

She said to stylishly <Color=red>decorate<Color=white> a weapon,
but I just don't know how to approach
this request!
She told me to "make it <Color=red>sparkle<Color=white>!" And
that "it must radiate burning <Color=red>passion<Color=white>!"
But I don't know what she's talking about.
And to top it all off, she's got an allergy
to monsters, so that means <Color=red>monster parts<Color=white>
won't do.
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>If I just had a weapon I could use as a
reference for where to start, that would
help a lot!

不过，若是你想试试装饰好的武器的威力，
没准现在正合适呢。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>現在這個時段怪物很多，
一般來說是不建議外出，
但如果想測試一下裝飾了那個的武器威力，
說不定很適合呢。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={2:4}いま>今の<Ruby={6:10}じかんたい>時間帯は <Ruby={4:6}まもの>魔物が<Ruby={2:4}おお>多く
<Ruby={4:6}ふだん>普段なら <Ruby={2:4}そと>外にでることは<Ruby={2:4}すす>薦めんが
ソイツで<Ruby={4:4}デコ>装飾った<Ruby={4:4}ぶき>武器の<Ruby={4:8}いりょく>威力を<Ruby={2:4}ため>試すなら

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>Normally I wouldn't recommend going out
into the desert at this hour—there are
usually quite a few monsters around.
However, if you want to test the strength
of a weapon you've added something to,
now is a perfect time!

rows.CNzh:

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>Monsters are often waking up around
now, so normally I wouldn't recommend
going out into the desert.
However, if you want to test the strength
of a weapon you've added something to,
now is a perfect time!

so normally I wouldn't recommend going
out there.

of a weapon you've added something to,
